commands.cmd: read-only primary-source coefficient, unit, applicability, PAL, privacy, idempotency and goal-series audit

summary: Approved an adult-only NASEM 2023 EER preview/apply implementation with fresh PAL selection and explicit append-only goal supersession.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Judge exceeded the single-wait limit and was interrupted; the PM performed the same read-only audit as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: Children, pregnancy and lactation remain intentionally unsupported.
A Worker must implement and prove the bounded adult estimate flow before chart work.
